title:
PROMPT 006: Location Pin Drop вЂ” "We're Here"
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1920Г—1080px (16:9)
DURATION: 2.5s | LOOP: No
SVG: Map pin / location marker (3 paths: outer teardrop body, inner circle, shadow ellipse) вЂ” centered 960Г—480px, 100px tall

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #E8F4FD (very light sky blue)
Pin body fill: #EF4444 (red)
Pin inner circle fill: #FFFFFF (white)
Pin stroke: #B91C1C (dark red, 2px)
Drop shadow: #00000025 (black 14% opacity ellipse below pin)
Ripple color: #EF4444 (red, fading)

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Pin appears dropping from above-frame. Lands at vertical center. Ground ripple expands at base.
Clean flat-map aesthetic. No other elements.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (2.5s total):
0вЂ“0.3s: Pin enters from Y:-120px в†’ Y:480px (drops in, ease-in acceleration)
0.3вЂ“0.42s: Pin overshoots to Y:510px (squash: scaleY 0.88 at impact)
0.42вЂ“0.58s: Pin bounces back to Y:480px (scaleY 1.0, ease-out spring)
0.58вЂ“0.75s: Inner circle scales 0 в†’ 1.0 (reveal, elastic spring)
0.75вЂ“1.3s: Ground shadow expands (ellipse scaleX 0 в†’ 1.0, ease-out) + ripple ring expands outward (circle, stroke #EF4444, opacity 0.6 в†’ 0, radius 20px в†’ 80px, 0.55s)
1.3вЂ“2.0s: Pin holds. Subtle float: Y:480 в†’ Y:472 в†’ Y:480 (ease-in-out, 0.7s cycle)
2.0вЂ“2.5s: Hold before cut

EASING CURVES:
- Drop: ease-in (cubic-bezier(0.55, 0, 1, 0.45))
- Bounce: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
- Float: ease-in-out
